name: Photo of product/texture
description: Take a clear photo of the dispensed product (close + mid shot).

name: Photo of display/alarm
description: Take a clear photo of the machine display showing mode/alarm/error.

name: Photo of leak area
description: Take a clear photo of where liquid/product is leaking (include drip tray/under machine).

name: Confirm FREEZE mode
description: Confirm the machine is in FREEZE mode (not WASH/STANDBY).

name: Confirm WASH mode
description: Confirm the machine is in WASH mode (for cleaning only).

name: Check mix/product level
description: Check hopper/bowl level is above low-mix sensor/min line.

name: Confirm mix is pre-chilled
description: Confirm refill mix/product was cooled in a fridge/coolroom before pouring in.

name: Confirm no frozen chunks added
description: Confirm no frozen product/chunks/ice were added into hopper/bowl.

name: Read hopper temperature
description: Read and report hopper temperature from display (if available).

name: Read cylinder/barrel temperature
description: Read and report cylinder/barrel temperature from display (if available).

name: Read viscosity setting
description: Read and report the current viscosity/firmness setting (if available).

name: Read error code
description: Read and report the exact error/alarm code and any flashing lights.

name: Check airflow/clearance
description: Confirm vents are unobstructed and clearance is maintained around the machine.

name: Inspect condenser for dust
description: Visually inspect condenser/air intake for dust/grease build-up (no panel removal).

name: Clean external air filter/vent
description: Clean accessible air filter/vent grill per operator manual (no tools/panels).

name: Confirm condenser cleaning
description: Confirm when condenser was last professionally cleaned.

name: Inspect air tube orientation
description: Check air tube is installed correctly (hole facing down where applicable).

name: Clean air tube/star cap
description: Remove and clean air tube/star cap with brushes as per cleaning procedure.

name: Confirm last full clean
description: Confirm last full disassembly + wash + sanitise (date/time).

name: Inspect drip tray
description: Check drip tray level and whether leak is steady or occasional.

name: Inspect O-rings/gaskets
description: Inspect door gasket and draw-valve O-rings for damage/flat spots.

name: Lubricate seals
description: Lubricate O-rings/gaskets with food-grade lubricant per manual.

name: Run rinse/sanitise cycle
description: Run rinse and sanitise cycle per operator manual.

name: Check product brix
description: Measure and report brix with refractometer (or confirm recipe brix spec).

name: Confirm recipe ratio
description: Confirm product was mixed to the correct water:syrup/base ratio.

name: Confirm hot environment
description: Confirm machine location is hot, outdoors, or in direct sunlight.

name: Confirm high-volume serving
description: Confirm serving volume is high/continuous with little recovery time.

name: Confirm idle time
description: Confirm machine sat idle (no draws) for >30 minutes.

name: Press RESET
description: Press the RESET button on the front control panel (if applicable).

name: Power cycle
description: Turn machine OFF, wait 60 seconds, turn ON.

name: Check outlet power
description: Confirm the outlet switch is ON and the plug is fully seated.

name: Check breaker/RCD
description: Confirm if breaker/RCD has tripped for the circuit.

name: Listen for compressor/fan
description: Listen for compressor and condenser fan starting a few seconds after FREEZE engaged.

name: Confirm lid closed
description: Confirm hopper/bowl lid is properly seated/closed.

name: Confirm door/handle locked
description: Confirm dispensing door and handles are locked/latched correctly.

name: Photo of model/serial plate
description: Take a clear photo of the machine data plate showing model and serial number.
